name: JSON Output
description: Assemble structured JSON per entity from all available data shapes (analysis, SEO plan, content).
usage_notes: Use 'strapi' format for CMS import, 'flat' for data analysis. Disable include_markdown if you only need structured data without article text.

options.name: output_format
options.label: Output format
options.description: Preset field mappings for the JSON structure.

options.name: include_markdown
options.label: Include markdown content
options.description: Include content_markdown as a string field.

options.name: include_analysis
options.label: Include analysis data
options.description: Include categories, tags, key_facts from analysis_json.

options.name: include_seo_plan
options.label: Include SEO plan
options.description: Include target_keywords, meta, FAQs from seo_plan_json.

options.name: flatten_key_facts
options.label: Flatten key facts
options.description: Hoist key_facts fields to top level instead of nested object.
